title: Picklist Value Change Tracking in Change Log
story: As a Salesforce administrator, I want the Data Dictionary change log to detect and record when picklist values change on a field, so that I can track additions, removals, or modifications to picklist options over time.
description:
Adds a new change tracking type called 'Picklist Value Change' to the Data Dictionary change log. When the scheduled refresh detects that a picklist field's available values have changed (values added, removed, or modified), a change log entry is created with this type.

This extends the existing change detection system to cover metadata changes at the picklist value level, not just at the field level.
acceptance_criteria: A new change type 'Picklist Value Change' appears in the change log
Change log records when picklist values are added to a field
Change log records when picklist values are removed from a field
Change log records when picklist values are modified
Change type filter dropdown includes 'Picklist Value Change' as an option
ux_changes: New 'Picklist Value Change' entries appear in the change log table. The change type filter dropdown includes this new type.
middleware_changes: Change detection logic extended to compare picklist values between refresh cycles. When differences are found, a change log entry is created with the 'Picklist Value Change' type.
data_model_changes: New change type enum value added. Change log entries store picklist value change details.
implementation_notes: The detection compares the current picklist values from the Salesforce describe API with the previously stored values. Differences are logged as individual change entries.
comment_summary: Developer asked for more description. Implemented the detection and deployed to dev for review.
